data.body: CHECKPOINT 2/6: Code patterns understood ✓ — enrich-file-impact.sh hardcodes MODEL=claude-haiku-4-5-20251001 (line 29); generate-skill-eval.sh hardcodes claude-haiku-4-5-20251001 in YAML template; semantic-conflict-check.py hardcodes MODEL=claude-haiku-4-20250514. WORKFLOW_CONFIG_FILE env var is the test-isolation mechanism for read-config.sh. resolve-model-id.sh reads model.haiku from config.
